title: M.Phil / Ph.D Jobs 2026 – Research Associate, Young Professional
org: Research Associate, Young Professional II, Young Professional I
shortInfo: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026: 3 Research Associate (MOEFCC-I), Young Professional II and Young Professional I vacancies announced. Apply through email on or before 18 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate, Young Professional Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate, Young Professional II, Young Professional I
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026: 3 Research Associate (MOEFCC-I), Young Professional II and Young Professional I vacancies announced. Apply through email on or before 18 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Environmental Sciences/Plant Physiology, Master’s degree (First class) in Environmental Sciences, Bachelor’s degree
qualification.details: Research Associate (MOEFCC-I): PhD in Environmental Sciences/Plant Physiology from a recognized university/institution. Five years of research experience in greenhouse gas emission measurement from rice fields and emission factor development. Desirable: Experience in chromatographic GHG analysis, volatilization losses, crop modeling, and data analysis software. Young Professional II: Master’s degree (First class) in Environmental Sciences from a recognized university/institution. Two years of experience in GHG measurement and gas chromatographic analysis. Desirable: Proficiency in data analysis software and soil plant analysis. Young Professional I: Bachelor’s degree from a recognized university/institution. At least one year of experience in GHG sampling and chromatographic analysis. Desirable: Working experience of gas chromatograph and canopy analyzer.

salary_details.salary: Rs. 61000/- + HRA, Rs. 42000/- consolidated, Rs. 30000/- consolidated

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 is 18th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate (MOEFCC-I) post. In total, ICAR-IARI is recruiting for 3 posts across different categories.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for Young Professional II?
faq.answer: For the Young Professional II position, candidates must possess a Master’s degree (First class) in Environmental Sciences from a recognized university or institution, along with two years of experience in GHG measurement and gas chromatographic analysis.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional I and Young Professional II posts is 45 years. For the Research Associate post, the maximum age is 40 years, with relaxations applicable.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The Research Associate (MOEFCC-I) will receive a salary of Rs. 61000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA). This is a consolidated amount for the contractual position.

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly via email. Candidates need to prepare their application with all required documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: What is the tentative date for the online interview?
faq.answer: The tentative date for the online interview for the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 is 25th June 2026. Candidates should be prepared for the interview on this date.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

seo_tags: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute Research Associate (MOEFCC-I)
